title: Senior Doctor - Pfizer India - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Pfizer India - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
